name: soc2 evidence collection: evidence is organized as per-control-id subdirectories under compliance/evidence/
command: mkdir -p compliance/evidence/CC1.1 compliance/evidence/CC8.1 && touch compliance/evidence/CC1.1/access-review.png compliance/evidence/CC8.1/change-ticket.pdf && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-evidence-folder.sh" --evidence-dir "$PWD/compliance/evidence" --layout per-control-subdir && echo ok 1>&2
